title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, dialog
scenario: Notifications toggle in App Settings shows OS redirect dialog when re-enabled after selecting "Don't Allow" during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and begin the onboarding flow.
2. When prompted for Notifications permission, select "Don't Allow".
5. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or Account icon to open the side menu.
9. Attempt to toggle the Notifications switch to ON.
expected: The Notifications toggle should turn ON, or the app should gracefully guide the user to enable notifications in OS settings without an error dialog.
